symptoms.symptom_name: Change from sharp pleuritic pain to constant pressure in known pericarditis

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Suggests evolution from inflammation alone to effusion under pressure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe positional dyspnoea, worse lying flat

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Classic symptom pattern of significant pericardial effusion/tamponade.
Reflects critically reduced cardiac output and cerebral perfusion.
Reflects peripheral vasoconstriction from low cardiac output/shock.
Definitive objective examination findings; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: A change in pain character, severe positional dyspnoea, and altered mental status in a patient with recent pericarditis together confirm evolving tamponade requiring emergency pericardiocentesis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive diagnosis and life-saving treatment for tamponade.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Priority 1 intensive care paramedic transport with IV access en route
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Time-critical transport to a facility capable of emergency pericardiocentesis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Increasing oral anti-inflammatory dose and reviewing in a few days
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would dangerously delay treatment of a mechanical cardiac emergency that anti-inflammatories cannot resolve.
